overall.description: A cinematic nighttime view of a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring massive holographic koi fish swimming in circular patterns above a multi-level circular intersection. The camera rotates slowly around the plaza, capturing neon-lit skyscrapers, sparse traffic with light trails, and the vibrant blue and orange holographic projections against the dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular cyberpunk plaza with holographic displays

events.description: holographic blue and orange koi fish begin crossing paths overhead

agents.ego_description: stationary aerial drone camera slowly rotating clockwise to track the holographic fish

entered.detail: large cyan-blue holographic fish with flowing fins swimming in the sky
large orange-red holographic fish with flowing fins swimming in the sky
multi-level circular intersection with elevated walkways and roads
tall skyscraper with illuminated PETROCHEM signage
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with bright neon advertisements
curved elevated highway with light trails from moving vehicles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night, dominated by two massive holographic koi fish swimming overhead. The blue fish begins on the left and the orange fish on the right, both moving toward the center as the camera slowly rotates. The circular plaza structure sits below with sparse traffic creating light trails on the elevated roadways, while the Petrochem tower and neon skyscrapers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular cyberpunk plaza with holographic displays

events.description: holographic fish reach opposite sides of the plaza, blue now on right and orange on left

agents.ego_description: continuing slow clockwise rotation to maintain focus on the swimming holographic projections

entered.detail: bright vertical advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its clockwise rotation, the holographic fish complete their crossing, with the blue fish now positioned on the right and the orange fish on the left. The circular plaza remains centered in the frame with traffic continuing to flow below, while the Petrochem tower shifts toward the center-right of the view and additional neon billboards become visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular cyberpunk plaza with holographic displays

events.description: holographic fish return to original starting positions, completing the circular swim cycle

agents.ego_description: completing the rotational sweep around the plaza as the holographic animation loops

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the holographic fish swim back to their original positions, with the blue fish returning to the left and the orange fish to the right. The camera completes its clockwise rotation around the plaza, returning to a similar orientation as the start of the clip. The Petrochem tower moves back to the far right, and the scene settles into the same configuration as the beginning, ready for the next loop of the animation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, clockwise rotation around a futuristic cyberpunk plaza, capturing the rhythmic crossing of massive holographic koi fish against a backdrop of neon skyscrapers. It begins with a blue fish on the left and an orange fish on the right swimming toward the center, while light trails from sparse traffic flow across the circular roadways below. As the camera continues its orbit, the fish complete their crossing to swap positions, shifting the Petrochem tower toward the center-right and revealing new neon billboards on the left. The scene then evolves as the holographic fish swim back toward their original sides, guiding the camera through the final arc of its rotation. Finally, the view returns to its starting orientation, with the Petrochem tower receding to the far right as the plaza settles back into its initial configuration.
